title: Automated dictionary-quality / coverage scoring
context: Quality must be measurable and provenance non-negotiable. This tool computes coverage and completeness scores, requiring 100% provenance to pass, and records before/after in the artifact. Tooling only.
objective: Implement automated dictionary-quality/coverage scoring that records before/after metrics and enforces 100% provenance to pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Computes field coverage, value-set coverage, provenance completeness (must be 100% to pass), unit/sentinel completeness, machine-validity; records before/after in the artifact.
output: PR to the repo adding the quality/coverage scoring tool.
